news.title: Star Wars Eclipse "literally cannot be finished" without more staff, insist striking Quantic Dream developers
news.titleEN: Star Wars Eclipse "literally cannot be finished" without more staff, insist striking Quantic Dream developers
news.desc: Striking staff at Quantic Dream have warned that if the studio proceeds with its plans to lay off 115 developers, its upcoming Star Wars Eclipse game "literally cannot be finished". Read more
news.descEN: Striking staff at Quantic Dream have warned that if the studio proceeds with its plans to lay off 115 developers, its upcoming Star Wars Eclipse game "literally cannot be finished". Read more

news.title: Viral hide-and-seek indie hit Meccha Chameleon sells 10m copies in just 16 days
news.titleEN: Viral hide-and-seek indie hit Meccha Chameleon sells 10m copies in just 16 days
news.desc: Just five days ago, we reported that indie hide-and-seek game Meccha Chameleon had sold seven million copies since its release on 10th June, and now it's topped another staggering milestone: 10 million copies sold. Read more
news.descEN: Just five days ago, we reported that indie hide-and-seek game Meccha Chameleon had sold seven million copies since its release on 10th June, and now it's topped another staggering milestone: 10 million copies sold. Read more

news.title: PlayStation is pulling "previously purchased" digital movies from users' libraries
news.titleEN: PlayStation is pulling "previously purchased" digital movies from users' libraries
news.desc: Sony has written to PlayStation customers to advise that hundreds of "previously purchased" digital movies previously available via its online store will "be removed" from video libraries later this year. Read more
news.descEN: Sony has written to PlayStation customers to advise that hundreds of "previously purchased" digital movies previously available via its online store will "be removed" from video libraries later this year. Read more

news.title: GTA 6 has no plans for a post-launch physical release, "not at launch, and not months later", insists new report
news.titleEN: GTA 6 has no plans for a post-launch physical release, "not at launch, and not months later", insists new report
news.desc: A new report has cast doubt on hopes that a physical version of Grand Theft Auto 6 will follow the digital release later this year. Read more

news.title: Switch 2 is the second fastest-selling console in US history, as PlayStation records its worst May in decades - and Xbox its worst May ever

news.title: The Steam Machine knock-offs begin as Stim Machine attempts to offer a more powerful machine at the same price and shape
news.titleEN: The Steam Machine knock-offs begin as Stim Machine attempts to offer a more powerful machine at the same price and shape
news.desc: The launch of the Steam Machine has officially given us the first attempt at a knock-off. The cheekily-named Stim Machine comes from a French hardware retailer, and it's taking an aim at Valve's mini-PC in a few key ways. Read more
news.descEN: The launch of the Steam Machine has officially given us the first attempt at a knock-off. The cheekily-named Stim Machine comes from a French hardware retailer, and it's taking an aim at Valve's mini-PC in a few key ways. Read more

news.title: GTA 6 takes aim at TikTok with a new social network where we'll apparently be able to follow influencers, get side missions, and maybe get famous?
news.titleEN: GTA 6 takes aim at TikTok with a new social network where we'll apparently be able to follow influencers, get side missions, and maybe get famous?
news.desc: Grand Theft Auto 6 apparently features a new in-game social network where we'll be able to watch videos and follow influences to discover "secret" side missions, which makes it sound like Rockstar is aiming its satirical cannon at TikTok and Instagra
news.descEN: Grand Theft Auto 6 apparently features a new in-game social network where we'll be able to watch videos and follow influences to discover "secret" side missions, which makes it sound like Rockstar is aiming its satirical cannon at TikTok and Instagra

news.title: Battlefield 6 is altering its long-range gunplay to feel more like Battlefield 4
news.titleEN: Battlefield 6 is altering its long-range gunplay to feel more like Battlefield 4
news.desc: As promised, Battlefield Studios has detailed how the gunplay of Battlefield 6 is being overhauled, and it turns out the developer wants it to feel closer to Battlefield 4. The proposed changes will arrive 30th June with the final update for Season 3
news.descEN: As promised, Battlefield Studios has detailed how the gunplay of Battlefield 6 is being overhauled, and it turns out the developer wants it to feel closer to Battlefield 4. The proposed changes will arrive 30th June with the final update for Season 3

news.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 demand may be so high it will "likely outstrip supply" this holiday season, a video game retailer warns
news.titleEN: Grand Theft Auto 6 demand may be so high it will "likely outstrip supply" this holiday season, a video game retailer warns
news.desc: Major retailers may not have the stock of consoles necessary to bear the incoming wave of demand this holiday season, thanks to Grand Theft Auto 6's release, it's claimed. Read more
news.descEN: Major retailers may not have the stock of consoles necessary to bear the incoming wave of demand this holiday season, thanks to Grand Theft Auto 6's release, it's claimed. Read more
